headline: KKR & Co. (KKR) Fell Due to Concerns Related to Private Credit
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its first quarter 2026 investor letter for its “Baron Financials EFT”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund fell 15.97% (NAV) compared with a 9.89% decline for the MSCI USA Financials Index (the Financials Index) and a 20.15% decline for the FactSet Global FinTech […]

headline: Did KKR’s (KKR) Milan Expansion and Wealth Push Just Reframe Its Liquidity Risk Narrative?
summary: In late May 2026, KKR said it had opened a new office in Milan to deepen its long-term commitment to Italy, backing more than €10.00 billion of capital deployed there since 2005 across private equity, real assets and credit. The move also advances KKR’s push into Italy’s private wealth market, with senior leaders relocating from London to build closer ties with local investors and companies. Next, we’ll examine how concerns over private equity fund liquidity, highlighted by Partners Group’s...
